positive: A Mid-Century Modern style pattern featuring stylized coffee mugs, geometric abstract shapes, and simple botanicals (like ferns). The design should use a limited, earthy color palette (mustard yellow, teal, burnt orange) and be designed as a seamless repeating pattern. Flat design, elegant, decorative, vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, gradient, messy, grunge
